translations.管理主题、保存策略、配置目录和更新通道: Manage theme, save behavior, config folder, and update channel
translations.集中放置高频工具入口，并提供常用的磁盘空间优化工具。: Keep frequent tools together and provide common disk space optimization utilities.
translations.迁移文件或目录，并在原位置创建链接，减少系统盘占用。: Move files or folders and create links at the original location to reduce system drive usage.
translations.扫描微信、浏览器、开发工具和模型缓存目录，一键填入迁移源路径。: Scan WeChat, browser, developer tool, and model cache folders, then fill the migration source path.
translations.按安装包、压缩包、旧文件和大目录列出下载残留，支持定位与清理。: List download leftovers such as installers, archives, old files, and large folders for locating and cleanup.
translations.按磁盘或目录统计一级目录占用，快速找出空间增长来源。: Analyze top-level folder usage by drive or folder to find where storage is growing.
translations.留空时自动使用系统下载目录: Leave empty to use the system Downloads folder
translations.可选：指定目录后优先分析该目录: Optional: specify a folder to analyze it first
translations.未找到下载目录，请手动选择目录: Downloads folder was not found. Choose a folder manually.
translations.未找到符合条件的常用缓存目录: No matching common cache folders were found.
translations.请先选择磁盘或目录: Select a drive or folder first
translations.扫描下载目录中的安装包、压缩包、临时下载、旧文件和大目录，按磁盘清理价值排序。: Scan installers, archives, temporary downloads, old files, and large folders in Downloads, sorted by cleanup value.
translations.按磁盘或指定目录统计一级目录与文件占用，用于定位 C 盘空间主要来源。: Analyze top-level folders and files by drive or folder to locate major C drive usage sources.
translations.需要管理员权限或开启 Windows 开发者模式: Requires administrator permission or Windows Developer Mode
translations.请先勾选需要清理的下载项: Select download items to clean first
translations.请先勾选需要清理的占用项: Select usage items to clean first
translations.请先选择磁盘或指定目录: Select a drive or folder first
Search rule name, path, or description...
translations.远程规则清单为空或缺少有效条目: Remote rule list is empty or has no valid entries
translations.管理已下载到本地缓存目录中的规则包文件: Manage rule pack files downloaded to the local cache folder
translations.从远程规则源选择规则包，一键下载并导入到当前自定义规则列表: Choose a rule pack from the remote source, then download and import it into the current custom rule list.
translations.选择左侧规则包后再显示详情: Select a rule pack on the left to show details
translations.请先从左侧选择一个规则包: Select a rule pack on the left first
translations.定时任务只支持对普通用户软件执行标准卸载。系统组件和极高风险软件会被跳过。: Scheduled tasks only support standard uninstall for normal user apps. System components and high-risk apps are skipped.
translations.该项来自关键词推断，可能是共享目录或共享注册表项，默认未勾选: This item was inferred by keyword and may be a shared folder or registry item. It is unchecked by default.
translations.命中存储、加密、固件或安全相关关键字，请确认确实属于目标软件: Storage, encryption, firmware, or security keywords matched. Confirm it belongs to the target app.
translations.疑似 BitLocker、TPM 或磁盘加密相关组件，强力卸载已拦截: Possible BitLocker, TPM, or disk encryption component. Force uninstall was blocked.
translations.系统组件、补丁或驱动，卸载后可能影响系统功能或硬件工作: System component, patch, or driver. Uninstalling may affect system features or hardware.
translations.运行库、驱动或安全类软件，卸载后可能影响系统或其他软件: Runtime, driver, or security software. Uninstalling may affect the system or other apps.
translations.恢复常见的资源管理器打开动作和可执行文件关联。: Restore common Explorer open actions and executable file associations.
translations.快捷方式目标为空或暂不支持解析: Shortcut target is empty or not supported yet
translations.快捷方式损坏或无法解析: Shortcut is damaged or cannot be resolved
translations.指向缺失的文件或目录: Points to a missing file or folder
translations.默认资源管理器关联已恢复；如资源管理器仍异常，请手动重启 explorer.ex: Default Explorer associations were restored. If Explorer still behaves abnormally, restart explorer.exe or sign in again.
translations.源路径：需要迁移的文件或文件夹: Source path: file or folder to move
translations.目标目录：迁移后的存放目录: Target folder: where moved data is stored
translations.聊天文件与缓存容易持续增长: Chat files and cache can keep growing
translations.企业微信文件与缓存通常占用较大: WeCom files and cache are often large
translations.包管理缓存体积较大，可重新下载: Package manager cache can be large and can be downloaded again
translations.Maven 依赖仓库常占用大量空间: Maven dependency repositories can use a lot of space
translations.Rust 依赖缓存可重新获取: Rust dependency cache can be fetched again
translations.模型与数据集缓存体积通常很大: Model and dataset caches are usually very large
translations.Android 开发相关目录，体积通常较大: Android development folders are often large
translations.容器或虚拟化环境目录，磁盘占用通常很大: Container or virtualization folders often use a lot of disk space
translations.确认不调试时勾选: Select only when debugging is not needed
translations.高风险：可能影响系统或其他软件: High risk: may affect the system or other apps
translations.自动保存常规清理中的勾选状态、自定义规则以及拖拽后的排序结果: Automatically save Standard Cleanup selections, custom rules, and drag order.
translations.开启后内置规则无法删除；关闭后可删除，且删除状态会保留到下次启动: When enabled, built-in rules cannot be deleted. When disabled, deletions are kept for the next launch.
translations.开启后，启动 Windows 时会自动启动本软件，无需手动打开软件: Start this app automatically when Windows starts.
translations.开启后，最小化或关闭窗口时会隐藏到系统托盘，可从托盘恢复或直接退出: Hide to the system tray when minimized or closed. Restore or exit from the tray.
translations.开启后，软件启动完成后会自动隐藏到系统托盘，可配合托盘运行使用: Hide to the system tray after startup. Use together with tray mode.
translations.可切换为跟随系统、浅色或深色，修改后立即生效: Switch between system, light, and dark themes. Changes apply immediately.
translations.清空硬盘类型检测缓存更换或新增硬盘后，建议执行一次: Clear disk type detection cache. Recommended after replacing or adding drives.
translations.检测 LOCALAPPDATA 中的旧版配置，并按你的选择迁移到当前配置目录: Detect legacy config under LOCALAPPDATA and migrate it to the current config folder.
translations.恢复常规清理的默认勾选与顺序，同时清除自定义规则: Restore Standard Cleanup defaults and remove custom rules.
translations.当前软件的规则、状态与全局设置都会保存在这里: Rules, state, and global settings are saved here.
translations.导出本次运行的会话日志、各页面日志快照和后台异常记录，便于排查问题: Export session logs, page log snapshots, and background errors for troubleshooting.
translations.稳定版只接收正式版本；测试版会接收 alpha、beta、rc 等预发布版本: Stable receives official releases only. Beta receives alpha, beta, rc, and other prereleases.
translations.跟随系统时会检测英文环境，并自动从云端获取语言包: Follow System detects English environments and downloads the language pack from the cloud.
translations.横向：图标在左文字在右；纵向：图标在上文字在下，修改后立即生效: Horizontal shows icons on the left and text on the right. Vertical shows icons above text. Changes apply immediately.
translations.软件已隐藏到系统托盘，可双击托盘图标恢复，或在托盘菜单中直接退出。: The app is hidden in the system tray. Double-click the tray icon to restore it, or exit from the tray menu.
